qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select max(emp.oi_empresa_ddo) as oi_empresa_ddo, emp.c_empresa from LIQ93_EMPRESAS as emp group by emp.c_empresa ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select SEC.policy as policy, emp.d_empresa from LIQ93_EMPRESAS as emp, NMD_SECURITY(NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC, ORG03_EMPRESAS JOIN emp.c_empresa inner ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa left outer SEC.Id where emp.oi_empresa_ddo={#SOURCE:/@oi_empresa_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW
